narrative:
Green Twp. township has 45,906 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.6 percentage points.
